name: Cosmos Hub
analysis: ATOM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $1.9720, stop $1.5511, target $2.1836 (0.50:1) — then trail it.
